experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Built and shipped production Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro extensions, including Vanish BG, a real-time AI background removal tool available at https://aescripts.com with ML inference running inside a sandboxed CEP environment.
Designed a Node.js sidecar process architecture to bypass CEP runtime limitations, handling AI inference outside the sandbox and streaming results back to a React UI in real time over local HTTP IPC.
Built and submitted a Premiere Pro TTS extension using Node.js with local ONNX model inference, designing the audio pipeline from text input to a rendered timeline clip.
Collaborated asynchronously with designers and stakeholders, shipping production-ready tools using agile workflows.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Built a full-stack tourism booking platform using Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js with TypeORM for type-safe PostgreSQL access.
Applied PostgreSQL indexing strategies and EXPLAIN ANALYZE to achieve sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payment gateway with idempotent transaction handling and webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40%.
Improved SEO and Core Web Vitals to 95+ Lighthouse score using Next.js SSR, image optimization, and lazy loading.

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.techStack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, BullMQ, ONNX, AWS ECS Fargate, Docker, GitHub Actions
highlights: Designed and deployed a distributed log ingestion pipeline on AWS ECS Fargate processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.
Reduced ONNX embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, Redis caching, and worker autoscaling.
Designed an event-driven pipeline (normalize, embed, cluster, merge, root cause) with retries, exponential backoff, dead-letter queues, and idempotent processing.
Implemented centroid-based pgvector clustering to unify cross-service failures into single root causes.
Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions OIDC, ECR, SSM Parameter Store, RDS PostgreSQL, and ElastiCache.
Applied PostgreSQL internals (MVCC, isolation levels, indexing) to build a high-throughput write pipeline while avoiding lock contention.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
highlights: Built a full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records.
Implemented JWT auth with access/refresh token rotation and RBAC across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using a graph-based PostgreSQL lookup.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.
